name: long, narrow passageway
description: I'm in a long, narrow passageway
hints: A narrow passageway with a bricked up doorway and a rope.
GET ROP - the rope is essential for reaching the throne room later.
The bricked up doorway may hide something. You might need to break through it.
GET ROP for later use. BRE DOO or BRE BRI to break through the bricked doorway. S=burial room (8).
notes: Narrow passageway with rope (important!) and bricked up doorway. S=burial room (8). The doorway may lead to hidden areas.
